description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a dark olive-green fuselage and straight, low-mounted wings. The wings and tail feature red and white insignia, likely representing Polish Air Force markings. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be multi-seat, with a long glass section extending along the fuselage. The nose is accented with an orange ring around the propeller, and there is a blue drop tank or bomb mounted under the fuselage. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, and the landing gear appears to be fixed in a taildragger configuration. The overall design suggests a World War II-era or vintage military trainer or light attack aircraft.
description: A vintage military-style, single-propeller airplane with olive-green paint, red and white insignia, and an enclosed multi-seat cockpit. It features a conventional tail, low-mounted straight wings, and a blue drop tank or bomb under the fuselage.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the orange-ringed propeller, blue drop tank, and clear canopy with visible cockpit details.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail number, Polish insignia on the wings, and the length of the glass canopy.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the right wing's insignia.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the propeller, nose details, and the under-fuselage blue drop tank or bomb.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward to mid-fuselage, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a long clear canopy.
